ANG.notes: Releasable Angola under German Southwest Africa in tno_1962.

AOF.notes: French West Africa represented as a macro-level colonial federation, expanded in tno_1962 to include modern Chad.

AOI.notes: Italian East Africa replaces the separate Eritrean and Somali colonial administrations in the 1939 setup.

AST.notes: Australian dependencies approximation retained outside the British subject tree in TNO 1962.

BRM.notes: Burma converted into a Japanese client state.

BWA.notes: British West Africa retained as an independent West African macro administration outside the British subject tree in TNO 1962.

CEY.notes: Ceylon retained as an independent state after the British decolonization cleanup in TNO 1962.

CHI.notes: 1962 semantic shift for CHI: the Nanjing-centered central Chinese client regime now absorbs the former coastal Reorganized Government core and Hainan.

EGY.notes: Italian protectorate baseline for Egypt in tno_1962.

ENG.notes: British imperial approximation for protectorates, mandates, and colonies outside the dedicated subject governments.

FIN.notes: Aland Islands should follow Finland in 1936.

FRA.notes: French colonial approximation for remaining African and overseas possessions outside the dedicated subject governments.

GER.notes: German 1936 eastern frontier including East Prussia and western territories now inside Poland.

GMA.notes: Gansu-Ningxia Ma sphere after ceding the Alxa banners to Mengjiang.

GRE.notes: Italian protectorate baseline for mainland Greece in tno_1962.

GXC.notes: Guangxi retained as a Japanese-aligned inland client clique.

HOL.notes: Dutch Suriname approximation outside the East Indies.

HUN.notes: Southern Slovak strip from targeted SK ADM2 split features.

INS.notes: Dutch East Indies successor retained as a Japanese client state.

ITA.notes: Italian occupation and annexation of Albania by 1939.

JAP.notes: Jidong Anti-Communist Autonomous Government area is represented as Japanese-controlled territory for 1936 scenario coloring.

JOR.notes: Italian protectorate baseline for Transjordan in tno_1962.

KOR.notes: Japanese colonial administration over Korea restyled as the Korean Residency-General in the 1962 scenario.

LBA.notes: Italian Libya represented as a distinct colonial administration.

LEB.notes: Italian protectorate baseline for Lebanon in tno_1962.

MAD.notes: Madagascar represented as a separate French colony.

MAL.notes: Malaya and attached dependencies converted into a Japanese client state.

MAN.notes: Manchukuo retained as a formal Japanese protectorate after ceding Dalian to direct Japanese control.

MEN.notes: Expanded Mengjiang covering the TNO-style Chahar-Suiyuan arc, Alxa, and the eastern Mongolian Khentii-Sukhbaatar-Dornod block.

MOR.notes: Unified releasable Morocco under the Iberian Union in tno_1962, replacing the prior French/Spanish split.

MZB.notes: Releasable Mozambique under German East Africa in tno_1962.

PAL.notes: Italian mandate baseline for Palestine in tno_1962.

PHI.notes: Philippines reworked from a United States-associated commonwealth into a Japanese client state.

QMA.notes: Qinghai Ma sphere reduced after transferring the Yushu basin and Geermu delegated belt to Tibet.

RAJ.notes: British Raj retained as an independent South Asian macro state outside the British subject tree in TNO 1962.

ROM.notes: Greater Romania including Bessarabia and northern Bukovina.

SAF.notes: South Africa retained outside the British subject tree while preserving the South West Africa approximation in TNO 1962.

SGN.notes: Spanish Guinea represented as a separate colonial administration.

SHX.notes: Northern inland Shanxi-Shaanxi collaboration regime after ceding the Datong arc to Mengjiang.

SIA.notes: Independent Co-Prosperity ally retained outside the Japanese subject tree while shifting to a darker muted olive.

SLO.notes: Slovakia appears as a separate axis-aligned puppet state in 1939.

SOV.notes: USSR baseline override across the modern Soviet successor states before western-border historical corrections.

IBR.notes: Iberian Union active state for tno_1962, absorbing Spain, Portugal, and Morocco while preserving them as releasable successor states.

SPR.notes: Releasable Spain under the Iberian Union in tno_1962.

SYR.notes: Italian protectorate baseline for Syria in tno_1962.

TAN.notes: Tannu Tuva renamed to People's Revolutionary Council for the requested TNO 1962 transfer set.

TUN.notes: Italian protectorate baseline for Tunisia in tno_1962.

TUR.notes: Hatay transfer to Turkey shortly before scenario start.

VIN.notes: Vietnam narrowed to the Vietnamese core after separating Laos and Cambodia.

YUN.notes: Yunnan contracted back to the Yunnan core after separating Guizhou.

RKN.notes: Manual overlay releasable for German Dutch occupation teaching preset.

RKP.notes: Feature-first Generalgouvernement masks. The historical reference footprint is the only exposed RKP boundary, and the German annexation belt is handled as a separate ownership transfer.

RKU.notes: Feature-first Ukraine mask. Historical is the only exposed boundary and includes the northeast, Donbas, Azov corridor, Kirovohrad, and Chernihiv while keeping Transnistria as a separate automatic Romania transfer.

RKO.notes: Feature-first Ostland masks. Warmia-Masuria stays with Germany, the Belarus footprint is resolved explicitly into Ostland, and Marijampole is auto-transferred to Germany when Ostland core territory is applied.

RKM.notes: Feature-first Moskowien mask. The exposed boundary is a single historical-reference footprint, including Saint Petersburg, Astrakhan, Kalmykia, the requested middle-Volga / Mari El / Komi districts, and the Belarus districts reassigned from Ostland. Greater Finland and the Russian Arctic islands are auto-transferred when Moskowien core territory is applied.

RKK.notes: Transcaucasia plus the North Caucasus groups represented by GER_is_RKK_state, including Dagestan but excluding Astrakhan and Kalmykia/Elista.

RKNO.notes: Manual overlay releasable for occupied Norway one-click fill.

NCP.notes: North China client administration enlarged to include the northern Henan prefectural belt while ceding the Japanese direct-control ports and the Kalgan/Zhangjiakou arc to Mengjiang.

RGC.notes: The Reformed Government shifts inland to the Sichuan-Chongqing basin and absorbs the old western SIC corridor.

GNG.notes: Separate Guangdong client state retaining the Pearl River core while absorbing Hong Kong and Macao.

XIN.notes: Fragmented Xinjiang client regime replacing the old SIK owner identity.

LAO.notes: Laos split out of the old Indochina block as a Japanese client state.

CAM.notes: Cambodia split out of the old Indochina block as a Japanese client state.

CRO.notes: Italy-aligned South Slav client state baseline for tno_1962.

SER.notes: Italy-aligned Serbian client state baseline for tno_1962.

ATL.notes: Synthetic owner used for Atlantropa land and sea staging in the 1962 scenario.

SCO.notes: TNO 1962 baseline independent Scotland after the partition of Britain.

WLS.notes: TNO 1962 baseline independent Wales after the partition of Britain.

ARM.notes: TNO 1962 baseline independent Armenia released from Reichskommissariat Kaukasien.

GUI.notes: New Guizhou military clique split out of the former Yunnan sphere.

TIB.notes: Restored Tibetan frontier client state holding the Tibetan plateau, the Yushu basin, and the Geermu delegated corridor.

FRI.notes: Azad Hind in the Japanese Co-Prosperity Sphere, spanning eastern India, Bangladesh, and the northeastern frontier while remaining grouped under Southern Asia.

BRG.notes: TNO 1962 baseline Burgundy replacing Reichskommissariat Belgien-Nordfrankreich.
BRG.selected_boundary_variant_description: Current TNO-style Burgundy footprint based on Belgium, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, and Somme.

boundary_variants.label: Current TNO Initial
boundary_variants.description: Current TNO-style Burgundy footprint based on Belgium, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, and Somme.

boundary_variants.label: Franco-Burgundian War
boundary_variants.description: Expanded Burgundy after victory over France, combining the northern TNO footprint with the eastern Burgundian block.

boundary_variants.label: Early Maximum
boundary_variants.description: Maximum early-project Burgundy, extending the expanded wartime footprint deeper into eastern and northeastern France.

TZA.notes: Releasable Tanzania under German East Africa in tno_1962.

ZAM.notes: Releasable Zambia under German East Africa in tno_1962.

ZIM.notes: Releasable Zimbabwe under German East Africa in tno_1962.

UGA.notes: Releasable Uganda under German East Africa in tno_1962.

RWA.notes: Releasable Rwanda under German East Africa in tno_1962.

BDI.notes: Releasable Burundi under German East Africa in tno_1962.

KAZ.notes: TNO 1962 independent Kazakhstan released from the Soviet Union.

UZB.notes: TNO 1962 independent Uzbekistan released from the Soviet Union.

TKM.notes: TNO 1962 independent Turkmenistan released from the Soviet Union.

KGZ.notes: TNO 1962 independent Kyrgyzstan released from the Soviet Union.

TJK.notes: TNO 1962 independent Tajikistan released from the Soviet Union.

GEA.notes: German East Africa colonial government in tno_1962, combining Mozambique, Malawi, Zambia, Zimbabwe, Tanzania, Uganda, Rwanda, and Burundi while preserving local releasables.

GCO.notes: German Congo colonial government in tno_1962, replacing Belgian Congo after the transfer of Rwanda and Burundi to German East Africa.

GSW.notes: German Southwest Africa colonial government in tno_1962, combining Angola and South West Africa while preserving Angola as a releasable successor state.

ARE.notes: TNO 1962 independent United Arab Emirates released from British Gulf holdings.

BHR.notes: TNO 1962 independent Bahrain released from British Gulf holdings.

QAT.notes: TNO 1962 independent Qatar released from British Gulf holdings.

PAK.notes: TNO 1962 independent Pakistan released from the British Raj.

MWI.notes: Releasable Malawi under German East Africa in tno_1962.

MNT.notes: Montenegro released from the Serbian Administration in tno_1962 while leaving the pre-existing Italian Kotor Bay holdouts in place.

RSF.notes: Emergency Russian remnant on the Sea of Okhotsk coast after the Manchukuo advance into the Soviet Far East.

PFC.notes: Pacific Fleet military command headquartered in Kamchatka after the fragmentation of Soviet authority in the Far East.

FIC.notes: Intervention zone across the northern Amur rail corridor detached from the wider Soviet Far East collapse.

SAM.notes: Samara is repurposed as the Russian Liberation Army for the requested Volga transfer set in TNO 1962.

OMS.notes: Generated from exact TNO 1962 state-owner geometry crosswalk against the current runtime feature set. coverage=0.671 spill=0.112

SVR.notes: Sverdlovsk is restyled as the Ural Military District for the requested west Siberian transfer set in TNO 1962.

ALT.notes: Generated from exact TNO 1962 state-owner geometry crosswalk against the current runtime feature set. coverage=0.754 spill=0.135

NOV.notes: Generated from exact TNO 1962 state-owner geometry crosswalk against the current runtime feature set. coverage=0.949 spill=0.184

TOM.notes: Generated from exact TNO 1962 state-owner geometry crosswalk against the current runtime feature set. coverage=0.699 spill=0.192

WRS.notes: West Russian Revolutionary Front scenario country restored for the north-western Russian transfer set in TNO 1962.

GCE.notes: German expeditionary occupation zone across Cornwall and the Bristol approaches in TNO 1962.

IRK.notes: Far Eastern Presidium formed from the Irkutsk transfer set in TNO 1962.

BRY.notes: Buryat Soviet Socialist Republic formed from the Buryat transfer set in TNO 1962.

CHT.notes: Far Eastern Tsardom formed from the Chita transfer set in TNO 1962.

YAK.notes: Sakha Republic restored from the Yakutia transfer set in TNO 1962.

SBA.notes: Siberian Black Army restored from the central Siberian transfer set in TNO 1962.

GOR.notes: 13th Panzer Army - Gorky formed from the Gorky transfer set in TNO 1962.

KOM.notes: Komi Republic restored from the requested north-eastern European transfer set in TNO 1962.

VOL.notes: Vologda Neutral Zone restored from the requested Vologda transfer set in TNO 1962.

KUR.notes: Kurdistan restored from the requested northern Iraq transfer set in TNO 1962.

FFR.notes: Free France restored in West Africa from the requested Ivory Coast transfer set in TNO 1962.

AFA.notes: African Anarchy created from the requested Saharan collapse zone in TNO 1962.

RFA.notes: Russian Anarchy created from the requested northern Siberian collapse zone in TNO 1962.

TYM.notes: Tyumen restored from the requested western Siberian transfer set in TNO 1962.

TAT.notes: Tatar Republic takes over the former Samara-held TNO 1962 Russian breakaway territory.

URA.display_name: Ural Military District Red Air Force
URA.notes: Ural Military District Red Air Force created from the requested western Siberian air command transfer set in TNO 1962.

VMT.notes: Viet Minh restored from the requested northern Vietnamese transfer set in TNO 1962.

RUR.notes: Rurik Kingdom created from the requested central Siberian transfer set in TNO 1962 using the Kemerovo palette color.

IAL.notes: Italian Algeria created from the requested eastern and southern Algerian transfer set in TNO 1962.

ALC.notes: Algerian Command created from the requested western Algerian transfer set in TNO 1962.

KRS.notes: Krasnodar created from the requested central Siberian transfer set in TNO 1962 using the KRS palette color.

VOR.notes: Vorkuta Labor Camp tag reserved from the requested northern camp transfer set in TNO 1962; the overlapping territory is subsequently reassigned to the Orenburg-Ural Union.

OUR.notes: Orenburg-Ural Union created from the requested southern Ural and Vorkuta transfer set in TNO 1962 using the Ural League palette color.

MC.notes: Monaco split out of residual French ownership as an independent microstate.

GY.notes: Guyana split out of residual British ownership as an independent state.

BZ.notes: Belize split out of residual British ownership as an independent state.

AQ.notes: Collapsed from runtime Antarctic sectors into a single land-only political feature for the TNO 1962 scenario.

POR.notes: Controller-only TNO passthrough stub for the Macau administrative overlay.

PRC.notes: Controller-only TNO frontline stub for the Communist China overlay.

SIC.notes: Controller-only TNO frontline stub for the Xikang Clique overlay.

SIK.notes: Controller-only TNO frontline stub for the Sinkiang overlay.

XSM.notes: Controller-only TNO frontline stub for the Xibei San Ma overlay.
